response: Start by replacing sugary drinks with water or herbal tea at [time of day]. Read nutrition labels carefully to identify hidden sugars in processed foods. Incorporate more whole fruits and vegetables into your meals at [meal name]. Gradually reduce added sugar to allow your taste buds to adjust naturally. Choose natural sweeteners like stevia or monk fruit if you need a sweet taste. Plan your meals ahead of time to avoid impulsive snacking on high-sugar items. Consult a nutritionist for personalized advice tailored to your specific health goals.
